source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
In the picture you can see a number flower. Mary pulled out all the leaves with numbers which give remainder 2 when divided by 6. What is the sum of the numbers on the leaves that Mary pulled out?
<image1>

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'In the picture you can see a number flower'
The task requires knowing the numbers written on the flower leaves, which are not listed in text
multi_step: Requires reading multiple numbers from the image, not just a single visual lookup
Requires applying a divisibility/modulo condition: select numbers with remainder 2 when divided by 6
Requires aggregating the selected values by summing them
This is a visual selection + arithmetic combination task with at least two reasoning steps
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single number: '46'
There is a clear deterministic procedure to verify: read leaf numbers, test mod 6 remainder, then sum

decision_reasons: image, question text, and numeric answer are all present with no registry issues
registry_passed is true, so core semantic assets are available
high image dependency is supported by an available image rather than being a missing-asset risk
verifiability is high because the answer is a deterministic numeric result with a clear checking procedure
multi-step visual selection plus arithmetic reasoning makes it a strong candidate
